# User Story to Pytest Skill

Use this skill when converting agile user stories into Python pytest cases.

## Steps

1. Read the user story.
2. Extract:
   - actor
   - goal
   - business value
   - acceptance criteria
3. Create test categories:
   - happy path
   - negative path
   - edge cases
   - validation rules
4. Generate pytest functions.
5. Use clear names:
   - test_<feature>_<condition>_<expected_result>
6. Add TODO comments where details are missing.
